'''Condular''' was a celestial body<ref name="Wizards">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030130jtptan|text=J't'p'tan: Temples and Tybis}}</ref> located in the [[Condular system/Legends|Condular system]], a part of the [[Southern Core]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was situated between the [[Chasin system/Legends|Chasin]] and [[Gandeal system/Legends|Gandeal systems]] on the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]].<ref name="TEA" /> Condular was home to the [[Grand Astrocartographic Institute]], which was active at least several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]<ref name="Wizards" /> of [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]–[[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Condular was first mentioned in "[https://web.archive.org/web/20030201185913/http://www.wizards.com/default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030130jtptan J't'p'tan: Temples and Tybis]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] source article written by [[Jason Fry]] for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' and published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[January 30]], [[2003]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Condular [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square M-12.<ref name="TEA" />
